description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a low, angular profile with a heavily armored exterior, designed for maximum protection and stealth. The body is constructed from dark, matte-finished metal panels with pronounced geometric lines and reinforced edges. Two wing-like side extensions are equipped with visible weapon mounts, each housing a forward-facing barrel, suggesting integrated armaments. The rear of the vehicle displays three prominent exhaust ports, indicating a powerful propulsion system, while the front is sharply sloped for deflection and reduced visibility. The surface is largely unadorned, with no visible markings or camouflage, emphasizing a utilitarian, stealth-oriented design. The overall appearance is robust and intimidating, suitable for urban combat scenarios.
description: A heavily armored, angular combat vehicle with wing-like extensions and visible weapon mounts, finished in dark matte metal. Its design is robust, stealthy, and built for urban tactical operations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply sloped, reinforced nose and the forward-facing weapon mounts on each side extension.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the low, angular profile, wing-like extension, and the protruding weapon barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals three large exhaust ports and the full width of the side extensions.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angular body, side extension, and weapon barrel.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two visible weapon mounts, one on each side extension, each with a forward-facing barrel.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; reinforced and sloped panels for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid dark gray/black matte finish.
